scripts.fetch: tsx -e "require('dotenv/config'); const {fetchAllSources} = require('./services/feeds'); fetchAllSources().then(n => { console.log('Done:', n); process.exit(0); })"
scripts.generate: tsx -e "require('dotenv/config'); const {runGenerationPipeline} = require('./services/generation'); runGenerationPipeline({count:10, runType:'manual'}).then(r => { console.log(r); process.exit(0); })"
